title: Speed curves upward during the burn — steeper as the rocket lightens
setup:
# --- plot helper (hidden) — rocket speed over a burn ---
def __burn(m_full, m_empty, ve, rate, dt, every):
    m = m_full; v = 0.0; t = 0.0
    pts = [[0.0, 0.0]]
    i = 0
    while m > m_empty:
        a = ve * rate / m
        v += a * dt; m -= rate * dt; t += dt
        if i % every == 0:
            pts.append([round(t, 2), round(v, 2)])
        i += 1
    pts.append([round(t, 2), round(v, 2)])
    return pts

def __plot(_):
    return [
        {"name": "half fuel (100 -> 40 kg)", "points": __burn(100, 40, 3000, 2, 0.05, 10), "highlight": False},
        {"name": "mostly fuel (50 -> 10 kg)", "points": __burn(50, 10, 2500, 1, 0.05, 10), "highlight": True},
    ]
